story.iWant: to edit the generated script content
story.soThat: I can customize the meditation text and timing to better fit the course needs

task.title: Add Edit Mode State to ScriptPreview Container

subtasks.subtask: Add isEditing state to connect.ts
Add isDirty state to track unsaved changes
Add handleEnterEditMode and handleExitEditMode functions
Add conditional rendering logic in index.tsx to switch between preview and edit views
Toggle button text between "Edit Script" and "Done Editing"
Create src/components/ScriptEditor.tsx component
Implement controlled textarea with value and onChange
Set up monospace font, proper sizing (min-h-[400px]), padding
Track cursor position for toolbar insertions
Implement insertTextAtCursor utility function
Add real-time metrics calculation and display

task.title: Implement Toolbar with Meditation Cue Buttons

subtasks.subtask: Create toolbar component within ScriptEditor
Add buttons: [PAUSE 3s], [PAUSE 5s], [BREATHE IN], [BREATHE OUT], [SILENCE 10s]
Style buttons with secondary/outline variant
Implement click handlers that insert text at cursor position
Preserve cursor position and focus after insertion
Ensure buttons are keyboard accessible (Tab + Enter/Space)
Add mutation in connect.ts: $api.useMutation('put', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}')
Create handleSaveScript function that calls mutation
Track save state: idle, saving, success, error
Update button text and icon based on save state
Show success checkmark for 2 seconds after successful save
Clear dirty flag on successful save
Handle error state with retry option
Preserve content on error
Create UnsavedChangesModal component using Dialog from shadcn/ui
Add modal state to connect.ts
Show modal when "Done Editing" clicked with dirty state
Implement "Save & Exit" button (save → exit)
Implement "Discard Changes" button (revert → exit)
Implement "Cancel" button (close modal, stay editing)
Add useEffect hook to set up beforeunload event listener
Show browser confirmation if isDirty is true
Clean up event listener on unmount or when dirty flag clears
Create save state indicator component/section
Display "Unsaved changes" text when dirty
Display "Save Changes" button (enabled when dirty, disabled when clean)
Display "Saving..." during save operation
Display "Saved ✓" on success (2 seconds)
Display "Failed to save - Retry" on error
Use Tailwind responsive classes for toolbar (flex-wrap on mobile)
Ensure toolbar buttons have min 44px tap target
Make Save button sticky or always visible on mobile
Test touch input on mobile devices/emulation
Run bun typecheck - verify no type errors
Run bun lint:fix - verify no lint errors
Manual test: Enter edit mode, verify UI changes
Manual test: Insert toolbar cues at various cursor positions
Manual test: Verify real-time metrics update
Manual test: Save changes, verify toast and state updates
Manual test: Exit edit mode with unsaved changes, verify modal
Manual test: Exit edit mode with no changes, verify no modal
Manual test: Navigate away with unsaved changes, verify browser confirmation
Manual test: Handle save error, verify retry functionality
Manual test: Responsive behavior on mobile

criterion.given: I am on the Script Preview page with a completed script
criterion.then: - The view switches to edit mode without navigation - The script content becomes editable in a large textarea - A toolbar with meditation cue buttons appears above the textarea - Real-time metrics (word count, character count, reading time) update as I type - The "Edit Script" button changes to "Done Editing" (outline style) - Other action buttons (Generate Audio, Regenerate) are hidden during edit mode

I see: - Toolbar with meditation cue buttons: [PAUSE 3s], [PAUSE 5s], [BREATHE IN], [BREATHE OUT], [SILENCE 10s] - Large textarea with monospace font (minimum height: 400px, auto-expanding) - Save state indicator: "Unsaved changes" when modified (dirty state) - "Save Changes" button (primary cyan) - enabled only when dirty - Button shows "Saving..." spinner during save operation - Success state: "Saved ✓" (green checkmark, 2 seconds, then back to idle)

- The corresponding text is inserted at the current cursor position - The cursor remains positioned right after the inserted text - The textarea maintains focus - The dirty flag is set (Save button becomes enabled) - Metrics update immediately

criterion.given: I have made changes to the script
criterion.then: - Real-time metrics update instantly (word count, character count, estimated reading time, total pause time) - The "Save Changes" button becomes enabled - A "dirty" indicator appears (e.g., "Unsaved changes" text)

- The button shows "Saving..." with spinner - A PUT request is sent to update the lesson script - On success: Toast "Script saved successfully", button shows "Saved ✓" for 2 seconds, dirty flag is cleared - On error: Toast error message, button shows "Failed to save - Retry" state, unsaved changes are preserved
- A confirmation modal appears with: "Unsaved Changes" title, message, and three buttons: "Save & Exit" (primary), "Discard Changes" (destructive), "Cancel" (outline)
- Edit mode exits immediately (no modal) - The view returns to preview mode with updated script - The "Done Editing" button changes back to "Edit Script" - All other action buttons reappear

criterion.given: I try to navigate away from the page with unsaved changes
criterion.when: I click browser back or try to navigate
criterion.then: - Browser shows native "Leave site?" confirmation - If I confirm, changes are lost - If I cancel, I stay on the page

criterion.given: the script save fails due to network/server error
criterion.then: - Error toast displays the error message - "Save Changes" button shows "Failed to save - Retry" state - Clicking the button attempts to save again - My changes remain in the textarea (not lost) - I can continue editing

criterion.when: I view the page on mobile
criterion.then: - The toolbar wraps to multiple rows if needed - Toolbar buttons are touch-friendly (min 44px tap target) - Textarea adapts to mobile viewport width - Save button is sticky at bottom or always visible - All functionality works with touch input

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Edit capabilities post-generation - Users can edit generated scripts after creation, with version history support. Forms validate required fields and support autosave functionality.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Strict separation between business logic (connect.ts) and presentation (index.tsx). connect.ts handles ALL business logic, data fetching, form handling. index.tsx is pure presentation, receives props from connect.ts. NO business logic in index.tsx, NO JSX in connect.ts.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.section: Form Management: React Hook Form + Zod
doc.snippet: Declarative forms with schema validation. React Hook Form for minimal re-renders (uncontrolled inputs), built-in validation. Zod for type-safe schema validation, runtime validation + TypeScript types.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Size variants: Small (400px), Medium (600px), Large (900px), Full (90vw). Dismiss behavior: Click outside dismisses (with unsaved changes warning), Escape key dismisses, Close button always present. Focus management: Auto-focus first input, Tab navigation trapped within modal.

doc.title: UX Design Specification
doc.snippet: Primary actions: Solid cyan (#7dcfff) background, hover lighter cyan (#9ee4ff) + lift effect. Disabled: Grey background, grey text. Secondary actions: Transparent background, cyan border. Destructive actions: Red/pink (#f7768e) background, always require confirmation.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Container Pattern with explicit save (NO auto-save). Dirty state tracking. Optimistic updates with error rollback. Browser navigation guard with beforeunload event. Controlled textarea with React state.

doc.title: Story 4.3: View and Preview Generated Script
doc.snippet: ScriptPreview container at src/containers/Main/ScriptPreview/. ScriptContent component renders speak/pause parts. calculateScriptMetrics utility with unit tests. Edit button already present. Container Pattern: logic in connect.ts, presentation in index.tsx.

artifact.reason: Main container for script preview. Contains "Edit Script" button that will trigger edit mode. Current implementation to be extended with edit mode state.
Business logic hook for ScriptPreview. Handles lesson data fetching, metrics calculation, and navigation. Will be extended with edit state, save mutation, and edit mode handlers.
Metrics calculation function that accepts script array and target duration. Will be adapted for plain text script editing to calculate metrics from edited content.
Renders script parts (speak/pause) in preview mode. Provides reference for understanding script structure and formatting patterns to apply in editor.
Reference implementation for PUT mutation pattern with dirty state checking, form handling, and error handling. Shows pattern for updating lesson data with React Hook Form.
Reference implementation for lesson update mutation (PUT /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}). Shows onSuccess cache invalidation pattern and error handling.
shadcn/ui Dialog component for unsaved changes modal. Provides accessible modal with proper focus management and dismiss behavior.
shadcn/ui Textarea component for script editor. Base component to be extended with monospace font, auto-expanding height, and cursor position tracking.
shadcn/ui Button component with variant system. Used for toolbar buttons (outline variant), Save button (default variant), and modal actions.

constraint.description: Container Pattern: ALL business logic (state, mutations, handlers) in connect.ts. Component (index.tsx) is purely presentational.
OpenAPI-First: Use $api.useMutation('put', '/api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}') for saving. Never write manual fetch calls.
Explicit Save (NO Auto-Save): Saving triggered only when user clicks "Save Changes" button. No debounced auto-save or onChange persistence.
Dirty State Tracking: Track isDirty flag when content changes. Enable Save button only when dirty. Clear on successful save.
Optimistic UI: Show success immediately, rollback on error. Use React Query onMutate, onSuccess, onError pattern.
Type Safety: Import types from @/types/models. Use Lesson type from OpenAPI schemas. All state properly typed with TypeScript.
Responsive Design: Toolbar wraps on mobile (flex-wrap), 44px min tap targets, sticky/visible Save button, touch-friendly interactions.
WCAG AA Compliance: Keyboard accessible (Tab, Enter/Space), visible focus indicators, aria-label on toolbar buttons, screen reader announcements for save state.
Pre-commit validation: bun typecheck (no type errors), bun lint:fix (no lint errors), manual testing per AC checklist.
Real-time Metrics: Calculate on every content change (onChange). Use useMemo to avoid unnecessary recalculations. Minimal re-renders.

interface.name: PUT /api/courses/{slug}/lessons/{id}
ScriptPart
Lesson
calculateScriptMetrics

tests.standards: Per project testing standards: Type checking with bun typecheck (strict TypeScript mode), linting with bun lint:fix (ESLint flat config with import ordering), manual testing for all acceptance criteria. No unit tests required for this story (manual validation focus). Future unit tests for serializeScript, parseScriptText, insertTextAtCursor, calculateMetricsFromText functions post-story completion.

ideas.idea: Test: Enter edit mode from preview. Verify textarea appears, toolbar renders, metrics display, button text changes to "Done Editing", other buttons hidden.
Test: Editor loads with toolbar buttons, monospace textarea (min 400px height), save state indicator, Save Changes button disabled initially.
Test: Click [PAUSE 3s] toolbar button. Verify text inserted at cursor, cursor moves after inserted text, textarea keeps focus, dirty flag set, Save button enabled.

Test: Type in textarea. Verify metrics update in real-time: word count (from speak content only, excluding pause markers), character count (total including pauses), estimated duration (reading time at 150 wpm + total pause time), total pause time (sum of all pause markers in seconds), pause percentage (pause time / total estimated duration * 100), target duration comparison (if lesson has target_duration, show difference with visual indicator when off by >1 min - red for over, green for under, neutral for within 1 min). Verify dirty flag set, Save button enabled.

Test: Click Save Changes with unsaved content. Verify mutation called, button shows "Saving...", toast on success "Script saved successfully", button shows "Saved ✓" for 2s, dirty flag cleared, button disabled.
Test: Click Done Editing with unsaved changes. Verify modal appears with title "Unsaved Changes", three buttons: Save & Exit, Discard Changes, Cancel.
Test: Click Done Editing with no unsaved changes. Verify immediate exit to preview mode, no modal, button text reverts to "Edit Script", other buttons reappear.
Test: Attempt browser back navigation with unsaved changes. Verify browser shows native "Leave site?" confirmation. Test both confirm (changes lost) and cancel (stay on page).
Test: Trigger save error (mock network failure). Verify error toast, button shows "Failed to save - Retry", clicking button retries save, textarea content preserved.
Test: View edit mode on mobile/narrow viewport. Verify toolbar wraps, buttons min 44px, Save button sticky/visible, touch input works, textarea adapts to viewport.
